Variables.Name: InnerRadius
Variables.Description: min distance between point and context

Variables.Name: OuterRadius
Variables.Description: max distance between point and context

Variables.Name: PointsPerRing
Variables.Description: number of items to generate for each ring

Variables.Name: ArcDirection
Variables.Description: If you generate items on a piece of circle you define direction of Arc cut here

Variables.Name: ArcAngle
Variables.Description: If you generate items on a piece of circle you define angle of Arc cut here

Variables.Name: bUseSpiralPattern
Variables.Description:
If true, the rings of the wheel will be rotated in a spiral pattern.  If false, they will all be at a zero
	   rotation, looking more like the spokes on a wheel.
